scenarioName: Tie method calls to receipt proof

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Tie method calls to receipt proof
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The method call should list repo-relative receipt paths including content hashes/receipt IDs. A missing required receipt should block the method call with the finding code 'method-call-receipt-missing'.
steps.observedResult: No execution results could be observed as the `report.md` and Gemini live-call receipt were not provided.
